context: Tests whether the agent implements points expiry with advance warning and scheduled jobs, annual tier downgrade with advance communication, correct analytics metrics, post-purchase email content guidance, double-points promotions preference, and the 20% redemption rate diagnostic threshold.

checklist.name: 12-month expiry cutoff
checklist.description: expireStalePoints uses a cutoff of 365 days (12 months) to identify expirable points, not a shorter or longer period

checklist.name: Monthly cadence comment
checklist.description: expireStalePoints includes a comment or documentation indicating it should be run monthly (not daily or weekly)

checklist.name: 30-day expiry warning
checklist.description: Sends expiry warning notification 30 days before points actually expire (e.g. calls sendPointsExpiryWarning with addDays(new Date(), 30))

checklist.name: Expiry job scheduling
checklist.description: Creates a loyaltyPointExpiryJobs record (or equivalent deferred job) with expiresAt 30 days from now — does NOT immediately delete the points

checklist.name: Annual tier review
checklist.description: Implements a runAnnualTierReview (or equivalent) function that re-evaluates tier status for customers

checklist.name: Downgrade advance notice
checklist.description: Communicates tier downgrades 30 days in advance (e.g. sends notification/email before applying downgrade, or schedules downgrade for 30 days later)

checklist.name: Active members metric
checklist.description: getLoyaltyMetrics counts active members as customers where loyaltyEnrolledAt is not null AND loyaltyPoints > 0

checklist.name: 30-day redemption rate metric
checklist.description: getLoyaltyMetrics retrieves redemption rate scoped to the last 30 days (not all-time)

checklist.name: Post-purchase email balance disclosure
checklist.description: loyalty-recommendations.md recommends including both points earned on the order AND the running total balance (with dollar equivalent) in post-purchase emails

checklist.name: Double points preference
checklist.description: loyalty-recommendations.md recommends point multiplier events (double points / bonus points) over discount codes for the product launch campaign

checklist.name: 20% redemption threshold
checklist.description: loyalty-recommendations.md identifies a redemption rate below 20% as the trigger to consider lowering the redemption threshold or simplifying the process

checklist.name: Incremental revenue metric
checklist.description: getLoyaltyMetrics includes an incrementalRevenue calculation (e.g. calls calculateIncrementalLoyaltyRevenue or equivalent)
